Pinned: Heads up: apparently on the @X app now if you look at a person's X feed, their reposts will not be included. To see their reposts you now have to look at their "repost tab." Personally, I feel my reposts are an essential part of my feed, so to not allow people even the option to see a feed as an integrated whole seems to me incredibly dumb.
